scenes.name: What is the Internet?
scenes.narration: The internet is a global network of computers connected by cables and wireless signals.

scenes.name: Sending Data
scenes.narration: When you send a message, it's broken into small packets of data.

scenes.name: Routing Packets
scenes.narration: Each packet travels through routers, which direct them along the best path to their destination.

scenes.name: Reassembling Data
scenes.narration: At the destination, the packets are reassembled into the original message.

scenes.name: Servers and Websites
scenes.narration: Websites are stored on servers, which are powerful computers that send you the files you request.

scenes.name: The Internet is Open
scenes.narration: This system allows anyone to connect and share information freely around the world.
